name: HRR_MEETING_REVW_CONTENT
description: This meeting table includes the content to be reviewed in the meeting.

columns.Name: REVIEW_CONTENT_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key to this table.

columns.Name: REVW_RATING_SEQUENCE
columns.Comments: The sequence column stores the order of ratings, determining their display order in the UI.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: MEETING_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HRR_MEETINGS.

columns.Name: REVW_CAREER_INTEREST
columns.Comments: Indicates whether Career Interest should be reviewed in the meeting.

columns.Name: REVW_CAREER_POTENTIAL
columns.Comments: Indicates whether Career Potential should be reviewed in the meeting.

columns.Name: REVW_COMP_RECORDS
columns.Comments: Indicates whether Compensation Records should be reviewed in the meeting.

columns.Name: REVW_COMPETENCIES
columns.Comments: Indicates whether Competencies should be reviewed in the meeting.

columns.Name: REVW_GOALS
columns.Comments: Indicates whether Goals should be reviewed in the meeting.

columns.Name: REVW_PERF_RATINGS
columns.Comments: Indicates whether Performance Ratings should be reviewed in the meeting.

columns.Name: REVW_RISK_LOSS
columns.Comments: Indicates whether Risk of Loss should be reviewed in the meeting.

columns.Name: REVW_IMPACT_LOSS
columns.Comments: Indicates whether Impact of Loss should be reviewed in the meeting.

columns.Name: REVW_MOBILITY
columns.Comments: REVW_MOBILITY

columns.Name: REVW_TALENT_SCORE
columns.Comments: REVW_TALENT_SCORE

columns.Name: DATA_VALIDITY_CODE
columns.Comments: The data validity guideline is intended to help the participants determine if the data already captured in the system is still valid for the talent review meeting.

columns.Name: METRIC_ID
columns.Comments: Metric defined in Dashboard template and enabled to be used as axis or underlay.

columns.Name: USE_AS_AXIS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to specify if a metric can be used as an axis

columns.Name: USE_AS_UNDERLAY_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to specify if a metric can be used as an underlay

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
